item.title: AxonOS-BCI/axonos-community-radar
item.description: AxonOS Radar — a living, auto-updated map of the open brain-computer-interface field. An AxonOS community project.

item.title: open-cogsci/OpenSesame
item.description: Graphical experiment builder for the social sciences

item.title: neuropoly/intranet.neuro.polymtl.ca
item.description: NeuroPoly's lab manual

item.title: fcbg-platforms/pycartool
item.description: A simple open source Python package for I/O between Cartool and Python

item.title: keras-team/keras
item.description: Deep Learning for humans

item.title: psychopy/psychopy
item.description: For running psychology and neuroscience experiments

item.title: rordenlab/dcm2niix
item.description: dcm2nii DICOM to NIfTI converter: compiled versions available from NITRC

item.title: neuroinformatics-unit/movement
item.description: A Python toolbox for analysing animal body movements across space and time

item.title: deepfakes/faceswap
item.description: Deepfakes Software For All

item.title: fooof-tools/fooof
item.description: Parameterizing neural power spectra into periodic & aperiodic components.

item.title: analyticalmonk/awesome-neuroscience
item.description: A curated list of awesome neuroscience libraries, software and any content related to the domain.

item.title: NVlabs/instant-ngp
item.description: Instant neural graphics primitives: lightning fast NeRF and more

item.title: labmlai/annotated_deep_learning_paper_implementations
item.description: 🧑‍🏫 60+ Implementations/tutorials of deep learning papers with side-by-side notes 📝; including transformers (original, xl, switch, feedback, vit, ...), optimizers (adam, adabelief, sophia, ...), gans(cyclegan, stylegan2, ...), 🎮 reinforceme

item.title: NeuromatchAcademy/course-content
item.description: NMA Computational Neuroscience course

item.title: nengo/nengo
item.description: A Python library for creating and simulating large-scale brain models

item.title: Verified-Intelligence/alpha-beta-CROWN
item.description: alpha-beta-CROWN: An Efficient, Scalable and GPU Accelerated Neural Network Verifier (winner of VNN-COMP 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025)

item.title: pieeg-club/EEGwithRaspberryPI
item.description: Not supported. Measure 8 EEG channels with Shield PiEEG and RaspberryPi in C library

item.title: wzpan/wukong-robot
item.description: 🤖 wukong-robot 是一个简单、灵活、优雅的中文语音对话机器人/智能音箱项目，支持ChatGPT多轮对话能力，还可能是首个支持脑机交互的开源智能音箱项目。

item.title: bee-san/Ciphey
item.description: ⚡ Automatically decrypt encryptions without knowing the key or cipher, decode encodings, and crack hashes ⚡

item.title: Baizhige/EEGUnity
item.description: An open source tool for large-scale EEG datasets processing

item.title: brainglobe/cellfinder
item.description: Automated 3D cell detection in very large images

item.title: brainglobe/brainrender
item.description: A Python package to visualise neuroanatomical data in atlas space

item.title: MouseLand/suite2p
item.description: cell detection in calcium imaging recordings

item.title: AxonOS-org/axonos-kernel
item.description: Hard real-time Rust microkernel for brain-computer interfaces. #![no_std] on Cortex-M, EDF scheduling with Kani-verified WCRT bounds, zero-copy intent path, capability-based privacy by construction. ABI v1 — tandem with axonos-sdk.

item.title: AxonOS-org/axonos-signal-pipeline
item.description: Deterministic, vector-pinned BCI signal pipeline for AxonOS: raw acquisition frame -> typed, consent-bound decision. no_std, zero-deps, unsafe-free, fixed-point. Engineering demonstrator, not a medical device.
